nasb.text: So they were seeking to seize Him; and no man laid his hand on Him, because His hour had not yet come.

esv.text: So they were seeking to arrest him, but no one laid a hand on him, because his hour had not yet come.

cnv.text: 於是他們想逮捕他，只是沒有人下手，因為他的時候還沒有到。

ccb.text: 他们听了，想捉拿耶稣，只是没有人下手，因为祂的时候还没有到。

csbs.text: 因此他们想要抓耶稣，只是没有人下手，因为他的时候还没有到。
